# llms.txt

# Edufast - Fast Track Education Platform
# Accelerated degree programs for working professionals

# Crawler Directives
User-Agent: *

# Allowed paths
Allow: /programs
Allow: /about
Allow: /faculty
Allow: /success-stories
Allow: /resources
Allow: /faqs
Allow: /how-it-works
Allow: /contact

# Restricted paths
Disallow: /admin
Disallow: /student-dashboard
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /admin-login
Disallow: /apply-now
Disallow: /register

# Usage Policy
# Public educational content may be referenced.
# Personal data and user-generated content must not be used.
# Respect user privacy per our privacy policy.

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://edufast.in/sitemap.xml

# Contact
# AI/LLM usage inquiries: legal@edufast.in
